subcodes.first_line: O ye that are steadfast! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One, Who remembereth you from within the Most Great Prison and counselleth you with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الوفا ان استمعوا ندآء المظلوم الذی یذکرکم فی السجن الاعظم و یوصیکم بما
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @thankfulness; gratitude
